recommendations.title: Babel
recommendations.overview: Tragedy strikes a married couple vacationing in the Moroccan desert, which jumpstarts an interlocking story involving four different families.

recommendations.title: Birdman or (The Unexpected Virtue of Ignorance)
recommendations.overview: A fading actor best known for his portrayal of a popular superhero attempts to mount a comeback by appearing in a Broadway play. As opening night approaches, his attempts to become more altruistic, rebuild his career, and reconnect with friends and f

recommendations.title: Django Unchained
recommendations.overview: With the help of a German bounty hunter, a freed slave sets out to rescue his wife from a brutal Mississippi plantation owner.

recommendations.title: Life in a Year
recommendations.overview: A 17 year old finds out that his girlfriend is dying, so he sets out to give her an entire life, in the last year she has left.

recommendations.title: Dances with Wolves
recommendations.overview: Wounded Civil War soldier John Dunbar tries to commit suicide—and becomes a hero instead. As a reward, he's assigned to his dream post, a remote junction on the Western frontier, and soon makes unlikely friends with the local Sioux tribe.

recommendations.title: Spirit: Stallion of the Cimarron
recommendations.overview: A captured mustang remains determined to return to his herd no matter what.

recommendations.title: To Each His Own Cinema
recommendations.overview: Commissioned to mark the 60th anniversary of the Cannes Film Festival, "To Each His Own Cinema" brought together 33 of the world's pre-eminent filmmakers to produce short pieces exploring the multifarious facets of cinema and their perspective on the
recommendations.director: Raymond Depardon, Andrei Konchalovsky, Lars von Trier, Chen Kaige, Michael Cimino, Atom Egoyan, Wim Wenders, Manoel de Oliveira, Hou Hsiao-hsien, Jean-Pierre Dardenne, Jane Campion, Zhang Yimou, Ken Loach, Nanni Moretti, Elia Suleiman, Alejandro G. Iñárritu, Wong Kar-Wai, Walter Salles, David Cronenberg, Theo Angelopoulos, Olivier Assayas, Abbas Kiarostami, Roman Polanski, Youssef Chahine, David Lynch, Raúl Ruiz, Amos Gitai, Takeshi Kitano, Gus Van Sant, Claude Lelouch, Tsai Ming-liang, Joel Coen, Luc Dardenne, Bille August, Ethan Coen, Aki Kaurismäki

recommendations.title: Promising Young Woman
recommendations.overview: A young woman, traumatized by a tragic event in her past, seeks out vengeance against those who crossed her path.

recommendations.title: True Grit
recommendations.overview: Following the murder of her father by a hired hand, a 14-year-old farm girl sets out to capture the killer. To aid her, she hires the toughest U.S. Marshal she can find—a man with 'true grit'—Reuben J. 'Rooster' Cogburn.

recommendations.title: Stagecoach
recommendations.overview: A group of people traveling on a stagecoach find their journey complicated by the threat of Geronimo, and learn something about each other in the process.
